Researchers have unveiled a new machine learning model that can predict molecular interactions with unprecedented accuracy, potentially cutting drug development timelines by years.

Ocean Currents Shift Raises Alarms

Marine scientists report significant changes in North Atlantic circulation patterns that could affect weather across Europe.

Film camera sales surge as younger generations embrace the tactile experience of analogue photography.
